name: French Onion-Cheese Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Kraft French Onion Soup Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients into the bread machine in the order listed.
2. Select white bread and push "Start."
3. For serving, spread one full slice per person with butter (or Better Than Butter) and dust with grated Parmesan cheese.
4. Cut circles out of the centers using a coffee can.
5. Place outer rings and circles on a cookie sheet and slide under an oven broiler to brown.
6. To serve: put one cutout in the bottom of each soup bowl, ladle hot soup into the bowls, then place the crusty outer rings atop the bowls.
